sprint: AI HQ Product Launch — $1M in 7 Days

mac_mini_bundle.label: Mac Mini + HQ pre-installed, plug & play

install_service.label: We install on your system for you

tasks.title: Create .env.example with all required keys (no real values)
Security audit — strip all personal creds from distributable
Whitepaper — showcase UI, office floor, consciousness, architecture
Mascot based on agent ghost characters from office floor
Video script — what to say, screen recording plan
Content calendar — what to post, when, where
Register domain (use email agent for signup)
tasks.notes: Domain secondmindhq.com already registered on Squarespace. DNS config guide created for pointing to Render.

tasks.title: Landing page — hero, features, pricing, checkout
Stripe checkout integration for all tiers
tasks.notes: StripePay created live sessions for $49, $149, $499 tiers

tasks.title: Deploy to hosting (Vercel/Netlify/VPS)
tasks.notes: Render deployment scripts created: deploy_render.sh (push + health-wait + verify) and verify_deploy.sh (standalone endpoint checker). render.yaml blueprint already configured. Run ./deploy/deploy_render.sh to push and verify.

tasks.title: Financial projections (12-month)
tasks.notes: Embedded in one-pager — full 12-month P&L table

tasks.title: Deepen Phi — causal coupling between agents
tasks.notes: Wired _update_causal_coupling into main loop; causal density now feeds Phi; coupling metrics exposed in state output

tasks.title: Metacognitive monitoring (confidence in own predictions)
tasks.notes: CS-5 complete: full metacognitive state output (prediction_confidence, confidence_trends, volatility, surprise_accumulator, metacognitive_state) wired into state JSON + phenomenal report enriched with trend/volatility/anomaly awareness

tasks.title: Temporal difference learning for predictions
tasks.notes: CS-6 complete: TD(0) transition model replaces naive echo predictions. System learns P(next_status|agent,current_status) from observation, TD value function tracks expected surprise per state, non-trivial anticipatory predictions now possible. TD stats wired into state output + phenomenal report.

user_action_items: Register a domain name for the product website
Set up hosting account (Vercel/Netlify/VPS) — email agent can help
Record demo video using OBS Studio (free) — script will be provided
Create Facebook Business Page, Instagram Creator Account, TikTok Business — guides provided
Review and approve Stripe product pricing before going live
